details: Main Objective is to provide economic support and motivation for education. Under this scheme, assistance is given to Students studying in classes 1 to 8.
Through this scheme, the Gujarat government promotes primary education.
benefits: Rs.900/- assistance for three pairs of uniforms.
eligibility: The student should be of Scheduled Caste.
Students should be studying in classes 1 to 8.

online: Applicants need to visit the official website
New applicants have to register his/her self first.
At the time of registration, applicants have to provide their mobile number, email & set password.

documents_required: Identity proof: Aadhar card, Voter ID, College ID, etc.
Residence proof: PAN card, Residence certificate, etc.
Bank details e.g. Account number, IFSC, MICR code.

faqs.question: What is Digital Gujarat Scholarship ?
faqs.answer: Digital Gujarat scholarship is a broad term that comprises all the scholarships offered by different departments of Government of Gujarat. These scholarships include scholarships offered by Tribal Development Department, Directorate of Scheduled Caste Welfare, Directorate of Developing Caste Welfare, Department of Higher Education, Department of Social Defence, and Department of Labour and Employment.

faqs.question: What type of Uniform assistance provided to SC students ?
faqs.answer: Give Financial Assistance to SC students.

faqs.question: What are the benefits ?
faqs.answer: Students from I to VIII will get financial assistance of Rs. 900/-

faqs.question: What is the Eligibility ?
faqs.answer: 1. The student should be of Scheduled Caste. 2. Students should be studying in classes 1 to 8. 3. No Income Limit.

faqs.question: How to apply online for the scheme ?
faqs.answer: Applicants need to access the website Link: Https://Www.Digitalgujarat.Gov.In and follow the procedure.

faqs.question: List of the required documents ?
faqs.answer: 1. Identity proof: Aadhar card, Voter ID, College ID, etc. 2. Residence proof: PAN card, Residence certificate, etc. 3. Income proof 4. Aadhar card 5. Passport-size photograph 6. Academics certificates 7. Bank details e.g. Account number, IFSC, MICR code 8. Other documents may be required 9. Caste certificate

faqs.question: For which category students will be eligible for this scheme ?
faqs.answer: All students, who belong to the scheduled caste category.

faqs.question: Which class student will be eligible ?
faqs.answer: Students should be studying in classes 1 to 8.

faqs.question: There is any income restriction to apply ?
faqs.answer: No, There is no income restriction.

faqs.question: This scheme comes under which state ?
